title: SR&ED webinars - Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives - Canada.ca
content:
Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives
The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) offers free webinars using MS Teams to help businesses gain a deeper understanding of the SR&ED program.
SR&ED general information
SR&ED general information
Pre-claim approval webinar
This webinar will provide a clear and practical overview of the pre-claim approval process. We will guide you through how to apply, who is eligible, what timelines to expect, and how this optional process can help your business plan SR&ED projects with more confidence.
SR&ED general information This webinar will provide a general overview of the SR&ED program. We will guide you through the eligibility criteria, qualifying expenditures, and the free tools and services offered by the CRA.

### Register for a webinar
To register, fill out the form below and click Submit.
We are committed to protecting your privacy. The email address you provide during registration, will be used solely to send you the webinar invitation. We will not use this information for any other purpose or share it with any third parties. Your data will be securely stored and deleted from our systems once the webinar has concluded.
Future SR&ED webinars will be listed as they become available. To receive updates about upcoming webinars and program announcements, subscribe to the SR&ED tax incentives email list .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
